title: HandAndUtils
description: This mod has a better viewmodel that allows you to choose configs in game.
body:
- **Viewmodel Changer** – pos/rot/scale on held items

You can create your own Viewmodel configs and save them, use at any time you want you don't have to reload your game to change viewmodels config!

- Configs save to `handandutils-configs` folder in your game dir  
- You can load custom configs that you saved in a JSON file  
- Open GUI keybind is \  
- Requires Fabric API.
